category_sources: source_facts.description says it serves a RESTful API from PostgreSQL; official docs describe PostgREST as a web server turning PostgreSQL into a RESTful API.

docs_sources: Dedicated official documentation domain docs.postgrest.org documents PostgREST; official repository README is secondary.
